description: JSON schema for the createCommunity operation request payload

supportEmail.description: A support email address to receive community-specific notifications at.

interactionNotifications.description: Whether to receive notifications for pending interactions by email at the support mailbox (see supportEmail).

apiKey.description: The API key to set for the community. If this key is already assigned, a new one will be generated.

domain.description: The API key identifying a domain that should be linked to the community.
